Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod.AddItem(FilCod, FilCodNom) EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPCARDID' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ZOOPCARDID' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ZOOPCARDID' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ZoopTip = nullvalue(&ZoopTip) &ZoopJaspiSts = nullvalue(&ZoopJaspiSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Zoop Pagamentos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ZoopJaspiSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ZoopTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = ZoopPagamentos.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, ZoopId) Do Case Case ZoopJaspiSts.ToString().Trim() = !"P" ZoopJaspiSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnBold WWColumnBoldSingleCell' Case ZoopJaspiSts.ToString().Trim() = !"V" ZoopJaspiSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case ZoopJaspiSts.ToString().Trim() = !"C" ZoopJaspiSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case ZoopJaspiSts.ToString().Trim() = !"L" ZoopJaspiSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise ZoopJaspiSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case ZoopTip.ToString().Trim() = !"B" ZoopTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case ZoopTip.ToString().Trim() = !"C" ZoopTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case ZoopTip.ToString().Trim() = !"D" ZoopTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise ZoopTip.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoReparar' do 'reparacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSyncronizarADM' do 'SyncADM' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwZoopPagamentos.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ZoopCardId1.Visible = False &ZoopBolId1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPCARDID' &ZoopCardId1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPBOLID' &ZoopBolId1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ZoopCardId2.Visible = False &ZoopBolId2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ZOOPCARDID' &ZoopCardId2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ZOOPBOLID' &ZoopBolId2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ZoopCardId3.Visible = False &ZoopBolId3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ZOOPCARDID' &ZoopCardId3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ZOOPBOLID' &ZoopBolId3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ZOOPCARDID' &ZoopCardId2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ZOOPCARDID' &ZoopCardId3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"ZOOPTIP" &ZoopTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"ZOOPJASPISTS" &ZoopJaspiSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"ZOOPDTAUPD" &ZoopDtaUpd.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &ZoopDtaUpd_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPCARDID' &ZoopCardId1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPBOLID' &ZoopBolId1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"ZOOPTIP", "", not &ZoopTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &ZoopTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"ZOOPJASPISTS", "", not &ZoopJaspiSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ZoopJaspiSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"ZOOPDTAUPD", "", not (&ZoopDtaUpd.IsEmpty() AND &ZoopDtaUpd_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &ZoopDtaUpd.ToString().Trim(), &ZoopDtaUpd_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPCARDID' AND not &ZoopCardId1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ZoopCardId1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ZOOPBOLID' AND not &ZoopBolId1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ZoopBolId1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ZOOPCARDID' AND not &ZoopCardId2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ZoopCardId2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ZOOPBOLID' AND not &ZoopBolId2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ZoopBolId2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ZOOPCARDID' AND not &ZoopCardId3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ZoopCardId3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ZOOPBOLID' AND not &ZoopBolId3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ZoopBolId3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ZoopPagamentos" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'reparacao' //TRANSACAO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ZoopId &zoopEvent = new() &zoopEvent.fee_details.Clear() &zoopEvent.history.Clear() &zoopEvent.FromJson(ZoopObs) prcGravaRegistroEntradaZoop.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &zoopEvent, ZoopObs) EndFor //RECEBIVEIS For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ZoopId, ZoopHisId &zoopEvent = new() &zoopEvent.fee_details.Clear() &zoopEvent.history.Clear() &zoopEvent.FromJson(ZoopHisObs) prcGravaRegistroEntradaZoop_Recebimento.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &zoopEvent, ZoopHisObs) EndFor EndSub Sub 'SyncADM' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where not FilZoopKey.IsNull() and not FilZoopKey.IsEmpty() getEventsADM_ZOOP.call(EmpCod, FilCod, FilZoopKey) EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
